Metadata.title: Mantur Canvas
Metadata.description: A multilingual Next.js app scaffold for Mantur Canvas.

AgentSwitcher.empty: No agents yet. Open the manager to create one.

dialog.title: Manage agents
dialog.description: Create, edit, and remove local agents for this project.

form.createDescription: Fill in the required fields and save the new agent.
form.editDescription: Update the current agent and save your changes.
form.name: Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional short description for this agent.

confirm.title: Delete agent
confirm.description: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

Home.title: Build multilingual experiences from a locale-aware app shell.
Home.description: This homepage now uses next-intl routing, message catalogs, and a simple language switcher so you can expand the site without duplicating pages.

Canvas.title: A minimal canvas wired with the libraries you added.
Canvas.description: This page combines React Flow for the graph, zustand for state, zod for seed validation, lucide-react for icons, and shadcn/ui for controls.
Canvas.localeDescription: The route and chrome stay localized, with {defaultLocale} as the default locale and {secondaryLocale} available as a secondary route.

stackItems.flow: React Flow renders draggable nodes and connections.
stackItems.store: zustand keeps the graph state in a small client store.
stackItems.schema: zod validates the initial graph data before hydration.
stackItems.ui: shadcn/ui provides the action buttons and shared UI primitives.

Canvas.canvasHint: Drag nodes, connect handles, and inspect the minimap.

storyboardList.title: Storyboards
storyboardList.confirmDeleteDescription: This will remove {name} from the storyboard list.

chatWindow.placeholder: Describe anything you want to generate

mediaGrid.deleteDescription: Delete {name} from this grid and project records?

source.title: Add asset
source.description: Choose where this asset comes from.

global.title: Import global
global.description: Choose from global characters, props, and scenes.

local.title: Local upload
local.description: Upload an image into the current project asset library.

ai.title: AI generation
ai.description: Save the prompt first, then generate or replace the image later.

global.title: Global assets
global.description: Choose a global asset to import.

form.title: Create asset

description.local: Upload a local image and fill in the asset details.
description.ai: Fill in the asset details. The image slot can be replaced by upload.

form.uploadRule: Supports png, jpg, jpeg, webp, and gif
form.name: Asset title

videoFooter.title: Video merge
videoFooter.count: {count, plural, one {# selected video} other {# selected videos}}
videoFooter.removeSelectedVideoDescription: This removes {name} from the video footer without deleting the video file.
videoFooter.mergeSuccess: The merged video was saved to the selected folder.
videoFooter.downloadSuccess: The current videos were saved to the selected folder.
videoFooter.mergeError: Unable to merge videos. Check directory access and ffmpeg.
videoFooter.downloadError: Unable to download videos. Check directory access.

globalChat.title: Global chat
globalChat.subtitle: Work with the current project context anytime
globalChat.welcome: I am here whenever you want to shape ideas, run agent commands, or move the project forward. Type /help to see commands.

commandReplies.default: I will send this message to the current agent command.
commandReplies.emptyResponse: The agent returned no response body.
commandReplies.noAgent: Select an agent from the left agent switcher first, and make sure its instructions field is an executable command.
commandReplies.unknown: Unknown command: {command}. Type /help to see available commands.

episodePanel.empty: No episodes in the current project

assetPanel.deleteConfirmDescription: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

parse.title: Parse assets
parse.description: Parse assets again from the current project content?

generate.title: Generate assets
generate.description: Generate assets for the current filtered set?

clear.title: Clear assets
clear.description: This will remove the current project's asset records and cannot be undone.

Skills.title: Skill Folders
Skills.description: Manage skill folders under the root skills directory.

modelManager.title: Model Manager
modelManager.description: Manage available image and video models. Each category can contain multiple models.

form.subtitle: Add a {type} generation model
form.name: Model Name
form.examplePlaceholder: Enter a sample call or usage note for this model
form.imageBedExamplePlaceholder: Enter the upload endpoint, access domain, or usage sample

validation.required: Model name, API key, and example are required.
validation.saveFailed: Unable to save model. Please try again.

feedback.saveError: Fill in name, API key, and example before saving.

Projects.deleteDescription: Delete "{name}"? This removes the project folder and cannot be undone.
Projects.commandDataLossConfirm: Refreshing or switching projects will discard all agent response data. Continue?

addScript.title: New Script Project
addScript.uploadDescription: Only Markdown scripts split by episode structure are supported. The project name is filled after parsing succeeds.
addScript.uploadHint: Click or drag a .md file here
addScript.invalidFormat: Please upload a .md format script file
addScript.parseError: Parse failed — no episode structure found
addScript.projectNameDescription: This name is used for the local project display metadata and can still be edited after parsing.
addScript.descriptionDescription: Add the project purpose, style, or production notes so it is easier to manage later.
addScript.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Storyboard project for the season one promo
addScript.aspectRatioDescription: Choose the default canvas ratio for storyboards and video assets created from this project.
addScript.resolutionDescription: Choose the default output resolution. Higher resolution usually uses more generation and storage resources.
